_calibration_reference: FMEA-sample.json (CESYS527 IR Sensor Encoder) — 4x5 matrix, 5-tier criticality
_maturity_context: Prototype-stage; in a post-v1 production FMEA all likelihood thresholds would be tightened one level.

severity.assignment_rule: Assign the WORST (highest) severity rating that has at least ONE condition met by the cause row.

levels.label: Negligible
conditions: Only internal telemetry affected; no founder-visible symptom
Cost to remediate < 5% of sprint budget
Requires less than 1 day to address
Performance adversely affected by less than 5%
No compliance, security, or data-loss implication

levels.label: Marginal
conditions: Transient UX degradation that self-heals without founder action
Cost 5-10% of sprint budget
Requires 1-6 days to address
Performance adversely affected by 5-10%
No compliance violation, no data loss

levels.label: Critical
conditions: Founder blocked on a core flow (intake / spec review / CLI emit) but no data loss
Cost 10-20% of sprint budget
Requires 1-2 weeks to address
Performance adversely affected by 10-20%
SLA breach or near-miss compliance event (recoverable audit gap, no external breach)

levels.label: Catastrophic
conditions: Violation of any hard constraint: EC10 citation floor, UC11 non-invasiveness, MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT=2%, or EC18 retention
Compliance breach under SOC2 / HIPAA / GDPR / PCI-DSS
Silent data loss, silent wrong-answer, or silent customer-system write
Cost > 20% of sprint budget
Requires more than 2 weeks to address
Performance adversely affected by > 20%

likelihood.basis: Estimated frequency in post-v1 production operation (not current prototype). Where no data exists, assign the conservative (higher) estimate.

levels.label: Remote
conditions: Occurs less than once per quarter under normal operation

levels.label: Unlikely
conditions: Occurs between once per fortnight and once per quarter

levels.label: Possible
conditions: Occurs up to once per week in production

levels.label: Likely
conditions: Occurs more than once per week
Or in 5-10% of founder sessions

levels.label: Frequent
conditions: Occurs multiple times per day
Or in more than 10% of founder sessions

levels.label: Obvious
conditions: Founder UI surfaces error within 1s

levels.label: Easy
conditions: Dashboard alert fires within 1 min

levels.label: Moderate
conditions: Visible in logs / metrics review within 1 day

levels.label: Hard
conditions: Requires targeted audit or customer report

levels.label: Near-invisible
conditions: Silent; only discovered by external party or incident

detectability_scale.usage: Reported as a standalone column; NOT multiplied into RPN (per KB Phase 7 alternative). Reserved for future iteration.
